title: TAG BROWSER
body: Left-side panel showing all providers, folders, tags, and UDT instances. Create, edit, drag tags onto views, manage structure.
code:
Tag Browser:
  [default]
    └ Plant
        └ TK101
            ├ Level     42.5  (GOOD)
            ├ Temp      65.2  (GOOD)
            ├ Pressure  1.2   (GOOD)
            └ InletValve
                ├ Open    true
                └ Closed  false

Right-click → New Tag
Right-click → New UDT Instance
Drag tag → drop on component = binding
key: Green dot = good, red = bad quality
mistakes: Designer vs gateway tag creation (both work)
Dragging the wrong path onto a component
